vocab.meaning: hội chứng thiếu hụt thiên nhiên (thường dùng để nhấn mạnh việc mình đã tránh được nó nhờ chơi ngoài trời)
vocab.example: I was lucky to avoid nature-deficit disorder because my favorite activity was exploring the woodlands behind my house.
Climbing trees gave me a fleeting sense of total freedom and mastery over the world.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy tình bạn thân thiết/tình đồng đội
vocab.example: Playing neighborhood hide-and-seek helped foster camaraderie among all the children on our street.
I gravitated towards chess and riddles as a child because I craved constant intellectual stimulation.

vocab.meaning: dễ tạo hình, dễ uốn nắn (dùng cho đồ chơi như đất sét)
vocab.example: I loved playing with malleable materials like plasticine to bring my imaginary creatures to life.
Thinking about the traditional kite-flying festivals always evokes deep nostalgia for my simpler childhood days.

vocab.meaning: sự nhanh nhẹn về thể chất
vocab.example: Hopscotch and skipping rope were brilliant for developing my physical agility and coordination.

vocab.meaning: sự chú ý tỉ mỉ đến từng chi tiết
vocab.example: Building model airplanes required meticulous attention to detail, which kept me occupied for hours.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần phiêu lưu mạo hiểm
vocab.example: My adventurous spirit led me to spend most of my childhood cycling to unexplored parts of the countryside.
Splashing in muddy puddles was a raw, joyful sensory experience that defined my early autumns.
